log-name-ext-page-versions: Name of the page versioning log, shown in log listings.
log-description-ext-page-versions: Description of the page versioning log, shown at the top of the log page.
logentry-ext-page-read-confirmations-con:
Log entry shown when a new page version is created. Parameters:
* $1 - the user who performed the action (name)
* $2 - the user who performed the action (for GENDER)
* $3 - the page title
* $4 - the version number
* $5 - the comment
logentry-ext-page-read-confirmations-rem:
Log entry shown when a page version is removed. Parameters:
* $1 - the user who performed the action (name)
* $2 - the user who performed the action (for GENDER)
* $3 - the page title
* $4 - the version number that was removed
pageversions-revision-exception-unavaila: Error message shown when the requested revision already has a version from a later revision. $1 is the revision ID.
pageversions-revision-exception-no-versi: Error message shown when no version is assigned to the given revision. $1 is the revision ID.
pageversions-versionhistory-grid-header-: Column header label for the version number in the version history grid.
pageversions-ca-create-label: Label for the content action (tab) that opens the dialog to create a new page version.
page-versions-next-versions-load-failed: Error message shown when loading version information fails. Displayed in the page version panel.
page-versions-next-versions-current: Label showing the previous page version. $1 is the version string (e.g. '1.0.0').
pageversions-ui-version-type-label-major: Label for the major version type option in the version creation dialog. $1 is the resulting version number (e.g. '2.0.0').
pageversions-ui-version-type-label-minor: Label for the minor version type option in the version creation dialog. $1 is the resulting version number (e.g. '1.1.0').
pageversions-ui-version-type-label-patch: Label for the patch version type option in the version creation dialog. $1 is the resulting version number (e.g. '1.0.1').
pageversions-ui-action-create: Button label to confirm and create a new page version in the version creation dialog.
pageversions-ui-action-cancel: Button label to cancel the version creation dialog without making any changes.
page-versions-next-versions-comment-labe: Label for the comment input field in the version creation panel.
page-versions-error: Generic error message shown in the UI when an unexpected error occurs.
pageversions-version-badge-label: Label for the version badge displayed in the page metadata. $1 is the version number (e.g. '1.2.3').
pageversions-automation-trigger-type-hea: Header label for the trigger configuration section in the wiki automations integration, used to select which version levels trigger an automation.
pageversions-automation-trigger-label: Label for the automation trigger that fires when a new page version is created.
pageversions-checkin-form-header: Header text of the check-in form asking the user whether to create a new page version upon page check-in.
pageversions-ui-version-type-label-none: Option label in the version type selector meaning no new version should be created.
pageversions-workflow-exception-no-title: Error message thrown in workflow activity when no valid page title is found.
pageversions-workflow-exception-no-revis: Error message thrown in workflow activity when no valid revision is found.
pageversions-workflow-exception-invalid-: Error message thrown in workflow activity when an invalid version type is specified.
pageversions-workflow-inspector-field-ve: Label for the version type field in the workflow activity inspector.
pageversions-workflow-version-type-label: Label for the major version type option in the workflow activity inspector.
Label for the minor version type option in the workflow activity inspector.
Label for the patch version type option in the workflow activity inspector.
pageversions-workflow-inspector-field-pa: Label for the page name field in the workflow activity inspector, specifying which page to create a version for.
